general.name: 1907 on macOS 15 or later
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>57702300-2327-45C7-861A-4C66968D2B06</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>57702300-2327-45C7-861A-4C66968D2B06</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>1907 on macOS 15 or later</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>66F88580-1AF2-4984-B12C-606020AF628F</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.wifi.managed</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>66F88580-1AF2-4984-B12C-606020AF628F</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>WiFi (1907)</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>HIDDEN_NETWORK</key><false/><key>EncryptionType</key><string>WPA2</string><key>AutoJoin</key><false/><key>CaptiveBypass</key><false/><key>ProxyType</key><string>None</string><key>DisableAssociationMACRandomization</key><true/><key>EAPClientConfiguration</key><dict><key>AcceptEAPTypes</key><array><integer>13</integer></array><key>TTLSInnerAuthentication</key><string>MSCHAPv2</string><key>TLSAllowTrustExceptions</key><true/></dict><key>SetupModes</key><array><string>System</string></array><key>SSID_STR</key><string>1907</string><key>Interface</key><string>BuiltInWireless</string></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>14040A21-BCA2-45D1-92D4-5008FC5B4110</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.scep</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>14040A21-BCA2-45D1-92D4-5008FC5B4110</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>SCEP</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>TemplateName</key><string>SGJAMF_ADCS</string><key>URL</key><string>https://saks.jamfcloud.com/CA/SCEP/config</string><key>AdcsSettingsId</key><integer>3</integer><key>ScepProxyOption</key><string>adcs</string><key>Challenge</key><string>$ADCSSCEPCHALLENGE</string><key>Key Type</key><string>RSA</string><key>Keysize</key><integer>2048</integer><key>Subject</key><array><array><array><string>CN</string><string>$COMPUTERNAME $PROFILE_IDENTIFIER</string></array></array></array><key>CertificateRenewalTimeInterval</key><integer>14</integer><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>2E4ED4E7-5708-458C-83CD-73887F483428</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.pkcs1</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>2E4ED4E7-5708-458C-83CD-73887F483428</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>CorpNMG-MDM-IssuingCA</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>CorpNMG-MDM-IssuingCA.cer</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict></array></dict></plist>
